hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.html$'; then echo "HTML file edited: $FILE" >> /tmp/landon-agent-edits.log; if command -v tidy >/dev/null 2>&1; then tidy -eq "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -5; fi; fi

hooks.prompt: Before stopping, verify: 1) Was state.json updated with the current timestamp? 2) Was activity-log.md appended with this run's actions? 3) If there were errors, was last_error set in state.json? 4) If you asked Landon a follow-up question, did you add it to pending_actions? If any of these are missing, complete them now before stopping.
